name: @pryzm/plugin-ifc-export
description: PRYZM 2 — IFC Tier 1 export plugin (Phase 3-B Sprint S56). Writes IFC4 STEP files from PRYZM element snapshots using web-ifc write mode. Supports Wall, Slab, Door, Window, Column, Beam (Tier 1). Round-trips Pset metadata + GlobalId via the side-car IFCMetaStore so identifiers and properties survive an import → edit → export → re-import cycle. Pure TS / Node-compatible — passes the bake-worker test (no DOM, no THREE, no React). The IFCMetaStore lives locally here until S55 lands it in @pryzm/stores.
